Apply Eye Makeup.action_anchor: A person uses makeup tools near their eyes.
phase_cues: applying product to eyelid or lash

Archery.action_anchor: A person draws and releases an arrow from a bow.

Baby Crawling.action_anchor: An infant moves forward on hands and knees across a floor.
phase_cues: baby gets on hands and knees
baby lifts one hand and opposite knee
baby moves forward and repeats with other limbs

Balance Beam.action_anchor: A gymnast performs acrobatic moves on a narrow elevated beam.
phase_cues: mounting the beam with controlled steps
performing turns and leaps in center
dismounting with aerial flip to mat

Band Marching.action_anchor: Musicians in uniform march in formation while playing instruments.
phase_cues: band members line up in formation
conductor signals start and musicians begin marching
band moves in coordinated patterns while playing music

Baseball Pitch.action_anchor: A pitcher winds up and throws a baseball toward home plate.

Basketball.action_anchor: A person dribbles and shoots a basketball toward a hoop.
phase_cues: aiming and jumping for a shot
ball arcing toward or through hoop

Basketball Dunk.action_anchor: A player jumps and forcefully puts the basketball through the hoop.

Bench Press.action_anchor: A person lies on a bench and pushes a barbell upward from their chest.
phase_cues: barbell pushed upward to full arm extension

Biking.action_anchor: A person pedals a bicycle on a road.

Billiards.action_anchor: A person uses a cue stick to strike balls on a felt-covered table.
phase_cues: player lines up shot with cue stick

Blow DryHair.action_anchor: A person holds a hair dryer to their head while moving it through damp hair.
phase_cues: person picks up hair dryer and turns it on
person directs airflow through sections of damp hair
person checks hair texture and turns off dryer

Body Weight Squats.action_anchor: A person bends their knees and lowers their hips while standing upright.

Bowling.action_anchor: A person swings and rolls a heavy ball down a lane toward pins.
phase_cues: approaching lane with ball in hand
swinging arm back and releasing ball

Boxing Punching Bag.action_anchor: A person punches a hanging heavy bag with boxing gloves.
scene_priors: heavy bag hanging from ceiling or stand
phase_cues: boxer assumes fighting stance facing bag
boxer throws punch making contact with bag
boxer retracts arm as bag swings from impact

Boxing Speed Bag.action_anchor: A person rapidly punches a small hanging bag with both fists.
phase_cues: starting with a light tap to set rhythm

Breast Stroke.action_anchor: A swimmer moves through water with symmetrical arm pulls and frog-like leg kicks.
phase_cues: arms pull outward and back, legs prepare to kick
arms recover forward, legs execute whip kick

Brushing Teeth.action_anchor: A person holds a toothbrush and moves it across their teeth.
phase_cues: person brushes teeth with rhythmic motions
person rinses mouth and cleans brush

Cricket Bowling.action_anchor: A bowler runs up and delivers a ball toward the batsman.
phase_cues: arm swings over to release ball

Drumming.action_anchor: A person strikes drumheads with drumsticks in rhythmic patterns.
phase_cues: recovering stick position for next strike

Fencing.action_anchor: Two opponents in white uniforms thrust and parry with thin swords.
phase_cues: fencer assumes en garde position with sword raised
opponents exchange rapid thrusts and parries
one fencer scores a touch with blade tip

Field Hockey Penalty.action_anchor: A player commits a foul and the referee awards a penalty.
phase_cues: player makes illegal contact with opponent or stick
referee blows whistle and signals penalty
player prepares to take penalty shot from spot
confusion_cues: penalty corner instead of penalty stroke

Frisbee Catch.action_anchor: A person catches a flying disc with their hands.
phase_cues: Person reaches hands to intercept disc

Front Crawl.action_anchor: A swimmer propels forward face-down with alternating arm strokes and flutter kicks.
phase_cues: Arm recovery over water with one arm extended forward.
Arm pull underwater while the other arm recovers.
Continuous flutter kicking throughout the stroke cycle.

Haircut.action_anchor: A person sits in a chair while another person cuts their hair with scissors.
phase_cues: person sits in chair and cape is placed
barber sections and cuts hair with tools
hair is styled and cape removed

Hammering.action_anchor: A person swings a hammer to strike a nail into a surface.

Head Massage.action_anchor: A person uses their hands to rub and press someone's head.
phase_cues: hands placed on head with fingers spread
gentle pressing and releasing of temples

Hula Hoop.action_anchor: A person rotates a hoop around their waist using hip movements.

Javelin Throw.action_anchor: An athlete runs and throws a long spear-like javelin.
phase_cues: athlete runs with javelin held overhead
athlete plants foot and rotates to throw
javelin flies through air and lands

Juggling Balls.action_anchor: A person tosses and catches multiple balls in a continuous pattern.

Jumping Jack.action_anchor: A person stands upright, jumps while spreading legs and raising arms overhead, then returns to starting position.
phase_cues: Stand with feet together and arms at sides.
Jump to spread legs wide and raise arms above head.
Jump back to starting position with feet together and arms down.

Kayaking.action_anchor: A person paddles a narrow boat on water using a double-bladed paddle.
phase_cues: maneuvering around obstacles or through rapids

Knitting.action_anchor: A person manipulates two needles to interloop yarn into fabric.
phase_cues: holding needles with yarn cast on

Long Jump.action_anchor: An athlete sprints down a runway and leaps into a sandpit.

Lunges.action_anchor: A person bends one knee forward while keeping the other leg straight behind.
phase_cues: starting in standing position with feet together
stepping one foot forward and bending both knees
pushing back to return to standing position

Military Parade.action_anchor: Soldiers march in formation with weapons while vehicles drive past.

Mixing.action_anchor: A person uses a tool to combine multiple substances in a container.

Mopping Floor.action_anchor: A person pushes a mop across a wet floor surface.
phase_cues: dipping mop into bucket of water
pushing mop across floor in overlapping strokes

Nunchucks.action_anchor: A person swings two sticks connected by a chain in circular motions.
phase_cues: initiating circular swing with one hand

Parallel Bars.action_anchor: A gymnast performs swings and holds on two horizontal bars.
phase_cues: starting with a mount onto the bars
swinging between the bars with controlled momentum
dismounting with a landing on mats

Pizza Tossing.action_anchor: A chef tosses pizza dough in the air with both hands.
phase_cues: chef holds dough flat on hands
chef tosses dough upward with flick
dough spins and expands in air

Playing Cello.action_anchor: A person sits with a cello between their knees, bowing the strings.

Playing Dhol.action_anchor: A person strikes a large double-headed drum with sticks.
phase_cues: Grasping drumsticks and positioning dhol on shoulder.
Alternating strikes on left and right drumheads.
Maintaining steady rhythm with coordinated arm movements.

Playing Flute.action_anchor: A person holds a flute horizontally to their mouth with both hands.
phase_cues: fingers moving over holes while blowing

Playing Piano.action_anchor: A person sits at a piano and presses keys with their fingers.

Playing Sitar.action_anchor: A person sits with a sitar on their lap, plucking its strings with a mizrab.

Playing Tabla.action_anchor: A person strikes two hand drums with fingers and palms.

Playing Violin.action_anchor: A person holds a violin under their chin and draws a bow across its strings.
phase_cues: holding violin under chin with left hand
drawing bow across strings with right hand
moving left fingers on fingerboard while bowing

Pole Vault.action_anchor: An athlete runs with a long pole, plants it into a box, and vaults over a high bar.
phase_cues: athlete sprints down runway holding pole
pole plants into box and bends, athlete lifts off
athlete clears bar and lands on mat

Pull Ups.action_anchor: A person grips a horizontal bar and pulls their body upward until their chin clears the bar.
phase_cues: person hangs from bar with arms extended
person pulls body upward by bending elbows
person lowers body back to starting position

Push Ups.action_anchor: A person lies face down and pushes their body up and down using their arms.

Rafting.action_anchor: People paddle an inflatable raft through turbulent river rapids.
phase_cues: team paddles in unison to navigate obstacles
raft exits rapids into calmer water

Rope Climbing.action_anchor: A person ascends a vertical rope using hands and legs.

Rowing.action_anchor: A person sits in a narrow boat and pulls oars through water.
phase_cues: oar blades enter water at catch position
rower pulls oars through power stroke
oars exit water and feather during recovery

Shaving Beard.action_anchor: A person uses a razor to remove facial hair.

Skijet.action_anchor: A person rides a personal watercraft over water.
phase_cues: mounting the skijet from water or dock
accelerating and maneuvering across water surface
making sharp turns creating spray patterns

Soccer Juggling.action_anchor: A person repeatedly kicks a soccer ball upward to keep it airborne.
phase_cues: foot makes contact to lift ball

Soccer Penalty.action_anchor: A player kicks a stationary ball from the penalty spot toward the goal.
phase_cues: Player places ball on penalty spot and steps back.
Player runs toward ball and kicks it toward goal.
Goalkeeper attempts to save the shot.

Sumo Wrestling.action_anchor: Two large wrestlers push and grapple in a circular ring.
phase_cues: Wrestlers squat and face off at ring center.
One wrestler pushes opponent with full body force.
Opponent steps out of ring or touches ground.

Swing.action_anchor: A person swings a baseball bat horizontally through the air.
phase_cues: rotating torso and swinging bat forward

Table Tennis Shot.action_anchor: A player swings a paddle to strike a small white ball over a net on a rectangular table.
phase_cues: player positions body and raises paddle
paddle swings forward to contact ball
arm follows through after ball impact

Tai Chi.action_anchor: A person performs slow, flowing martial arts movements in a standing position.
phase_cues: Starting with feet shoulder-width apart in a relaxed stance
Executing a sequence of flowing arm and leg movements
Concluding with controlled breathing and centered posture

Throw Discus.action_anchor: An athlete spins and releases a heavy disc from their hand.
phase_cues: athlete spins with discus in hand

Trampoline Jumping.action_anchor: A person bounces up and down on a trampoline.
phase_cues: person pushes off and ascends into air
person descends and lands on trampoline

Typing.action_anchor: A person's fingers press keys on a keyboard.

Uneven Bars.action_anchor: A gymnast performs swinging and release moves between two horizontal bars at different heights.
phase_cues: mount onto lower bar with jump or swing
transition between bars with kip or giant swing
dismount with salto or twist to land

Walking WithDog.action_anchor: A person moves forward on foot while holding a dog's leash.
phase_cues: person stands with dog on leash

Wall Pushups.action_anchor: A person performs pushups against a vertical wall.
phase_cues: hands placed on wall at shoulder height
body leans toward wall with elbows bending
body pushes back to starting position

Writing On Board.action_anchor: A person uses a marker to write text on a whiteboard.
phase_cues: hand moves to write characters or words
person steps back to view writing

Yo Yo.action_anchor: A person manipulates a yo-yo on a string with hand motions.

Blowing Candles.action_anchor: A person leans forward and exhales toward lit candles on a cake.
phase_cues: candle flames flicker and go out

Clean And Jerk.action_anchor: A weightlifter lifts a barbell from the floor to overhead in two distinct motions.

athlete dips and drives under barbell
barbell pressed overhead with locked arms

Cliff Diving.action_anchor: A person leaps from a high cliff into water below.
phase_cues: climbing or standing at cliff edge

Cutting in Kitchen.action_anchor: A person slices vegetables on a cutting board with a knife.

Diving.action_anchor: A person leaps from a platform or springboard into a body of water.
phase_cues: entry into water with minimal splash

Floor Gymnastics.action_anchor: A gymnast performs acrobatic movements on a padded floor mat.

Golf Swing.action_anchor: A golfer swings a club to strike a golf ball.

Handstand Walking.action_anchor: A person walks forward while balanced upside down on their hands.

Horse Race.action_anchor: Multiple horses with jockeys sprint along a track.
phase_cues: horses lined up in starting gates

Ice Dancing.action_anchor: Two skaters perform synchronized choreography on ice.
phase_cues: Partners take starting positions on ice.
They execute choreographed sequences in unison.
They conclude with final pose and exit.

Jump Rope.action_anchor: A person swings a rope overhead and jumps over it as it passes underfoot.
phase_cues: rope swings upward behind the person
person jumps as rope arcs overhead
rope passes under feet and swings back

Pommel Horse.action_anchor: A gymnast swings their body around a pommel horse apparatus.

Punch.action_anchor: A person's fist makes forceful contact with another person's body.

Rock Climbing Indoor.action_anchor: A person ascends an artificial climbing wall using handholds and footholds.

Salsa Spin.action_anchor: A dancer rotates their body while maintaining salsa footwork and posture.
phase_cues: prepares with weight on one foot and arms positioned
initiates rotation with hip movement and foot pivot
completes turn with controlled stop and weight redistribution

Skiing.action_anchor: A person glides down a snowy mountain on skis.
phase_cues: standing at slope top with skis parallel

Sky Diving.action_anchor: A person jumps from an aircraft and falls through the air with a parachute.

Still Rings.action_anchor: A gymnast performs strength holds and swings on two suspended rings.
phase_cues: executing strength elements like iron cross

Surfing.action_anchor: A person rides a surfboard on ocean waves.
phase_cues: catching a wave and popping up

Tennis Swing.action_anchor: A player swings a tennis racket to hit a ball.

Volleyball Spiking.action_anchor: A player jumps and forcefully hits the volleyball downward over the net.
phase_cues: arm swings back then forward to contact ball
ball travels sharply downward across net
